g.text: Match Monitor Saba Group Betting - CustID Mapping Dictionary Logic (Updated 2025-11-19)
Saba uses its own Customer ID system
These are different from CTS internal IDs
These are CTS's internal customer identifiers
- But Saba transactions have Saba CustID
- Need mapping to bridge the gap
Bridge between Saba and CTS customer IDs
Ensures dictionary is not modified during processing
Uses mapped CTSCustID for internal queries
Uses Saba CustIDs in final results!
- Saba uses different customer ID system
- Seamless integration between Saba and CTS
- No changes to core detection logic
